ORDER REGARDING DEFENDANT WEDRIVEU, INC'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WEDRIVEU, INC.'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS TO THE NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION AND OVERRULED AS TO THE TENTH CAUSE OF ACTION. THE NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION WAS DISMISSED ON DECEMBER 1, 2016. THE TENTH CAUSE OF ACTION ADEQUATELY ALLEGES THAT PLAINTIFF SETH STANCLIFF SUFFERED AN ADVERSE EMPLOYMENT BY WEDRIVEU IN VIOLATION OF PUBLIC POLICY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2017 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2017 Set For Trial On Nov-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Siddharth Jhans of Jhans Law telephone number 415-994-2653 for Plaintiff Seth Stancliff.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant WeDriveU, Inc.'s demurrer to the complaint is off calendar as to the ninth cause of action and overruled as to the tenth cause of action. The ninth cause of action was dismissed on December 1, 2016. The tenth cause of action adequately alleges that plaintiff Seth Stancliff suffered an adverse employment by WeDriveU in violation of public policy. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
